description: As a user, I want to log into ProtonMail so that I can access my email

scenarios.name: Login page loads with branding
scenarios.given: I navigate to the ProtonMail login page

scenarios.name: Login form displays all required fields
scenarios.given: I am on the ProtonMail login page
then: a username input field should be visible
a password input field should be visible
a sign-in button should be visible

scenarios.name: Successful login with valid credentials
scenarios.given: I am on the ProtonMail login page
scenarios.when: I enter valid credentials and sign in
scenarios.then: I should be redirected to my inbox

scenarios.name: Login with invalid password shows error
scenarios.given: I am on the ProtonMail login page
scenarios.when: I enter an incorrect password and sign in
scenarios.then: an error message should be displayed
